mapper.select:
SELECT b.book_id, b.book_title, b.author_name, b.publisher, b.publish_date, b.book_price, b.stock_status, b.book_summary, b.cover_image, b.category_id, b.isbn, b.book_stock, b.created_at, b.updated_at, IFNULL(COUNT(r.review_id), 0) AS review_count FROM book b LEFT JOIN review r ON b.book_id = r.book_id
b.stock_status = '추천'
b.stock_status = '베스트셀러'
b.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY b.book_id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}
